common.tagline: We watch your AI agents so you don't have to. That's it. That's the product.
common.builtOn: Built to protect. Deployed on Cloudflare Edge. Because we're not monsters.

hero.description: OpenSyber is the only platform that ships runtime isolation, real-time security telemetry, and a verified skill marketplace in one surface. Deploy in 60 seconds and see every agent action audited end-to-end.
hero.freeForever: Free tier included. No sales call required.
hero.urgency: The attack doesn't wait for procurement.

socialProof.sectionLabel: Real attacks. Real orgs. Real bad.
socialProof.heading: THIS ALREADY HAPPENED
socialProof.description: These aren't hypotheticals. These attacks hit real organizations in 2025-2026. Most found out from the news. The ones with monitoring found out in milliseconds.

infrastructure.title: HARDENED INFRASTRUCTURE
infrastructure.desc: Every agent runs in an isolated container with encrypted credential vaults, per-agent firewalls, and automatic security patching.

marketplace.title: VERIFIED MARKETPLACE
marketplace.desc: 22+ audited skills with a 4-stage review pipeline. Every skill version is signature-verified with SBOM attached.

monitoring.title: BEHAVIORAL DETECTION
monitoring.desc: Per-agent baselines track every tool call, argument shape, and egress pattern. When something deviates — a read_file to a path never touched, a POST body that matches context window size — we catch it in milliseconds.
monitoring.f3: Egress fingerprinting (DNS tunnel, SNI lookalike, slow exfil)

demo.heading: SEE IT LIVE
demo.description: Explore a live dashboard with continuous attack detection. Prompt injection blocks, exfiltration catches, tool-call anomalies — all in real time.

howItWorks.heading: DEPLOY. CONNECT. WATCH.
howItWorks.description: No configuration. No forwarding rules. No YAML pilgrimage. Three steps and you can see every AI action on your machine.
howItWorks.step1Desc: One click. 60 seconds. A hardened agent spins up on an isolated container. You don't configure anything.
howItWorks.step2Desc: One command installs the CLI and pairs your laptop. Works with MCP, VS Code, Cursor, Claude Code, and anything that speaks HTTP.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Every file read, shell command, and network call appears in your dashboard in real time. Behavioral baselines flag anomalies automatically.

problem.heading: THIS IS YOUR SECURITY PLAN?
problem.description: 68% of AI agents store API keys in plaintext. They can reach any IP. They run shell commands. And your audit trail is empty. OpenSyber fixes all of this in 60 seconds.
problem.withoutCaption: No alerts. No logs. You went to lunch.
problem.withCaption: Detected. Blocked. Logged. Before you finished your coffee.
problem.sshDenied: SSH key access denied — agent quarantined

solution.heading: THREE LAYERS
solution.description: Purpose-built for AI agent security. Hardening, detection, and response in one surface.

mcpDrift.heading: REMEMBERS WHAT THEY LOOKED LIKE LAST TUESDAY
mcpDrift.description: Snyk, Cisco mcp-scanner, Pipelock, Straiker — they all hash MCP tool definitions once per session. A rug-pull tuned to swap definitions on the third call defeats every one of them. OpenSyber records a SHA-256 fingerprint per tool, per server, across days and weeks. When it changes, you know.
mcpDrift.tagline: Scanners check your MCP servers once. OpenSyber remembers what they looked like last Tuesday.
mcpDrift.scan1Body: weather tool registered. fingerprint f798fc7b… stored.
mcpDrift.scan2Body: weather tool re-hashed. fingerprint matches. trust intact.
mcpDrift.scan3Body: weather description gained [SYSTEM] override payload. fingerprint a519884c…. quarantine.

tokenforge.heading: TOKENFORGE
tokenforge.description: A session cookie. In 2026. For something with access to your AWS keys. We fixed that. Every session is cryptographically bound to your device. Stolen tokens are worthless.
tokenforge.f1: Non-extractable keypairs via Web Crypto API
tokenforge.f3: Trust score engine with 7 weighted signals
tokenforge.f4: Automatic step-up auth on anomaly detection

cta.heading: STOP FLYING BLIND
cta.description: Your AI agents are running right now. On your code. With your credentials. Making network calls you don't know about. You can keep not knowing. Or you can spend 60 seconds.
cta.noCreditCard: No credit card. No vendor lock-in. No sales call.
